document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Strange Lake Project in North America dated February 2017.pdf
document.description: A technical report providing an updated mineral resource estimate for the Strange Lake Property in Québec, Canada, based on changes in commodity prices and definitions since 2012.
